allowed_vm_sizes.description: A set of virtual machine sizes that are allowed to be placed in this proximity placement group. This helps in optimizing the performance of applications by co-locating VMs in close proximity.

name.description: The name of the proximity placement group, which is a logical grouping of Azure resources to improve the performance of your applications by minimizing network latency.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs used to tag the proximity placement group with metadata, allowing for easy organization and management of resources.

zone.description: The zone of the proximity placement group, which can be used to specify the availability zone within a region where the resources should be placed.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
